name: Raspberry Fruit Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fresh fruit for dipping, such as strawberries, melon balls, fresh pineapple chunks, or peach sections.
2. Gently wash the raspberries; drain thoroughly.
3. In a covered blender container, blend the berries and sugar until smooth.
4. Strain through a medium sieve to remove any solids.
5. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
6. Beat in the raspberry pulp until well blended and smooth.
7. Refrigerate the mixture.
8. Arrange the fruits around the bowl of dip.
9. Serve as an appetizer or summer dessert.
